title: Agility India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Agility India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!
